decisions.summary: Split resolution accepted: keep Story 2 as one bundled PR because docs/spec/source/tests form one reviewable IA flow-map unit.
decisions.reason: The three commits are a single story progression, and changed files are limited to the IA flow-map gate, its docs/spec, Design SSOT registry, and focused regression tests.

decisions.summary: Scope reviewability accepted: one reviewer can review the UI/UX IA flow-map Story 2 branch as a coherent contract, implementation, and verification change.
decisions.reason: Review owner is the gate/IA-flow-map reviewer; the PR contains no unrelated runtime path, secret, deployment, or product UI implementation beyond the map/gate surfaces.

decisions.summary: Keep Story 2 changes bundled for review: the branch contains one coherent IA flow map implementation across Story, Spec, Architecture, CLI/source wiring, tests, and Design SSOT links; no unrelated runtime/product change is included.
decisions.reason: A single reviewer can evaluate the contract, implementation, and regression coverage together. Splitting would separate gate behavior from its tests/spec and weaken AC traceability for UIFM-S-1 through UIFM-S-5.
